title: Showy's HT1 mods
description: The mods I (show_y) use for PvP
body:
_The modpack I currently use for PvP, and the one I used to get **HT1** in NethOP!_ 

It includes:
- Many performance mods (Based either on Vulkan or Sodium)
- PvP Utility mods (like AppleSkin, Combat-Hitboxes, ArmorHUD,  etc)
- QOL mods (such as ScoreBoardTweaks)
